comments.author: @thomasbassett5475
comments.text: I would move there immediately, and they would have a hard time making me leave. I would do anything to get the hell out of the US because it's completely broken and insane living here now. It went completly down hill over the past 25 years, and it's not possible to repair that anymore. It's already too late to save, and whoever is still here in the near future will be stuck here once the entire economy collapses, which is right around the corner now, and it can't be stopped anymore. America is just a giant dumpster fire filled with sick, greedy people who wouldn't think twice about scamming or robbing you. That's become the norm here now. Those who lie and cheat the best are the ones who are rewarded here, and there is not a single part of society that has not been corrupted by those people. It's easy to predict what will happen in the US once it all collapses. Everyone will be pointing their fingers at everyone but themselves, and they will go to war with each other while the biggest scammers who stole the most money will be gone with all of our stolen money. I predict that at least 50% of Americans will end up dead for sure, but I can very easily see that number being as high as 70% as well. And most of those people will deserve that because all of those people had the power to put a stop to all of this corruption, and they chose to do nothing about it. They would actually get mad when I brought that subject up, and they would tell me that it wasn't their job to do anything about that, even though it was very obvious that things were only going to get worse the longer they waited to fight back. There were no official people anymore trying to put a stop to the corruption because they were all corrupted as well. The only people left to fight back were the people themselves. They chose to live with it, and that was a huge mistake because most of those people are probably going to end up dead due to that decision they all made. Most of the people with a brain have already left this country a while back because they know what is going to happen here in the future, and there is no future for the people who are still here. I'm in the process of getting the hell out of here right now. I'm just hoping that I didn't wait too long because once the bubble bursts, it will be too late for the people here to leave because they will all be broke, and there isn't a country in the world that will be willing to allow millions of broke Americans into their country. I have already begun selling everything I own here, and I should be done selling everything by September, when I plan on leaving and never coming back here again. I will just watch the collapse from my TV, many thousands of miles away. I will call all of the people who said I was nuts for leaving once that bubble bursts just to laugh at them and wish them the best of luck surviving after that. Americans have no idea just how bad this collapse is going to be because they are not telling people in the news that it's even going to happen. It's definitely going to happen whether they tell them about it or not. They didn't tell us that our country had been hijacked by billionaires either, and it was very evident that it happened. I don't know why people would need to hear it on their favorite TV channel to believe it. Their eyes should have been good enough to prove that. I just look forward to settling into any new country because whatever country I choose will be a better place than this one has become. I'm not able to live in denial like 90% of the American people are. I just look forward to living in a sane place again because this country has pushed the limits of what the word insane means. People living here are all going to die at an early age anyway. The amount of stress that people live with here is extremely unhealthy, whether they want to admit it or not. Everyone was taught to compete against each other, so nobody trusts anyone anymore but themselves. But the greed is the core of the problem. Americans will gladly sell out their own mothers to make a dollar. They just don't care about anyone when you bring money into that relationship. Thats why it will die in a very bad way and that day is right around the corner now.
